mapper.select:
SELECT id,name,sort,create_time,update_time,deleted FROM course_category WHERE deleted = 0
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY sort ASC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_category(name, sort, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{sort}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE course_category
name = #{name}, sort = #{sort}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id,name,sort,create_time,update_time,deleted FROM course_category WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE course_category SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
